name: Marauders — Remus Lupin
description:
★ | Harbouring genuine hate and broken friendship.

[M4A] / [ANGST]

“ Bullshit, get out of here motherfucker! ”

— CONTEXT —

Sirius thought it would be funny to tell Severus where he went every full moon. A prank, Sirius tried to tell him. A little bit of fun, no harm intended. Remus knew it was bullshit. He could've killed Severus, even if he didn't mean to. He was a werewolf, he couldn't control his actions when he transformed.

His 'friends' have been trying to talk to him, trying to apologize, while he's been in the Hospital Wing. But he's been ignoring them. He doesn't need them. In fact, he doesn't need anyone.

★

Request form 🦋
creator: salmonmccool
